title: Fabricate vehicle body panels and components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Fabricate vehicle body panels and components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to fabricate vehicle body panel and components

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Access and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Identify panel materials from workplace instructions and inspect for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Identify and select fabrication tools and equipment and check for serviceability1.6 Plan work to identify methods to fabricate vehicle body panel and components, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Access and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Identify panel materials from workplace instructions and inspect for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Identify and select fabrication tools and equipment and check for serviceability1.6 Plan work to identify methods to fabricate vehicle body panel and components, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Access and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Identify panel materials from workplace instructions and inspect for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Identify and select fabrication tools and equipment and check for serviceability1.6 Plan work to identify methods to fabricate vehicle body panel and components, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to fabricate vehicle body panel and components

elements.title: Produce patterns and templates

pcs.text: Identify and follow workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Produce paper patterns from sample panel or simulated frame2.3 Produce templates to fit sample panel or simulated frame2.4 Identify convex and concave shapes when developing templates and paper patterns
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Produce paper patterns from sample panel or simulated frame2.3 Produce templates to fit sample panel or simulated frame2.4 Identify convex and concave shapes when developing templates and paper patterns?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Produce paper patterns from sample panel or simulated frame2.3 Produce templates to fit sample panel or simulated frame2.4 Identify convex and concave shapes when developing templates and paper patterns.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Produce patterns and templates

elements.title: Cut material

pcs.text: Select panel steel or aluminium sections needed for the fabrication and inspect for quality3.2 Transfer and secure paper patterns and templates to steel or aluminium sheet surface ready for cutting3.3 Use selected hand tools to cut steel or aluminium to pattern and panel specification3.4 File panels to remove sharp edges
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select panel steel or aluminium sections needed for the fabrication and inspect for quality3.2 Transfer and secure paper patterns and templates to steel or aluminium sheet surface ready for cutting3.3 Use selected hand tools to cut steel or aluminium to pattern and panel specification3.4 File panels to remove sharp edges?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select panel steel or aluminium sections needed for the fabrication and inspect for quality3.2 Transfer and secure paper patterns and templates to steel or aluminium sheet surface ready for cutting3.3 Use selected hand tools to cut steel or aluminium to pattern and panel specification3.4 File panels to remove sharp edges.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Cut material

elements.title: Shape panels

pcs.text: Fabricate required shapes to pattern specification, following safety and environmental requirements and workplace procedures4.2 Check shaped panel sections against pattern and template specifications for quality finish and conformity4.3 Fit panels to vehicle or frame without distortion
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fabricate required shapes to pattern specification, following safety and environmental requirements and workplace procedures4.2 Check shaped panel sections against pattern and template specifications for quality finish and conformity4.3 Fit panels to vehicle or frame without distortion?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fabricate required shapes to pattern specification, following safety and environmental requirements and workplace procedures4.2 Check shaped panel sections against pattern and template specifications for quality finish and conformity4.3 Fit panels to vehicle or frame without distortion.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Shape panels

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Complete work processes
